title: Bio-Regeneration doubles hit roll results while equipped

card.rawText: Can only be equipped to a creature with 9 or less remaining HP. Heal 30 HP. 2x Hit Roll results for this creature. 2x Atk Damage for this creature.

plan.title: Bio-Regeneration doubles hit roll results while equipped
plan.summary: Attach Bio-Regeneration to a low-HP creature and verify the hit-roll stat modifier route is active while equipped.

notes: Pre-place Bio-Regeneration on field magic slot attached to player_1 primary creature.
Set player_1 primary current hp to 5.
2x Hit Roll results for this creature.

steps: Put Bio-Regeneration in player_1 magic slot.
Attach it to player_1 primary creature.
Verify the while-equipped effect is represented by runtime state/events.
manualVerification: Verify against card text: Can only be equipped to a creature with 9 or less remaining HP. Heal 30 HP. 2x Hit Roll results for this creature. 2x Atk Damage for this creature.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the headless expected-success route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_009_bio_regeneration-009-e03 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
